channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kwankwaso Supports NDC’s Decision to Zone 2027 Presidential Ticket to South
item.description: Rabiu Kwankwaso, former governor of Kano State and ex-presidential aspirant, don show say e dey okay with the National Democratic Congress (NDC) decision to zone their 2027 presidential ticket to the ...

item.title: Constitutional Court ruling forces Parliament to proceed with Phala Phala impeachment inquiry
item.description: South Africa’s Constitutional Court has ruled that Parliament acted unlawfully when it blocked further proceedings on the Phala Phala matter involving President Cyril Ramaphosa. The controversy stems ...

item.title: Key Philippine News This Week: Arrest of Franco Mabanta, Romualdez Properties, Carandang Vindication, Seafarer Issues, and Senate Flood Probe
item.description: This week's top stories in the Philippines highlight a mix of political accountability, legal victories, and challenges faced by Filipinos abroad. Social media operator Franco Mabanta was arrested for...

item.title: Rising Interest in Electric Bikes in Pakistan as Petrol Prices Soar
item.description: KARACHI: Pakistan's auto sector is experiencing notable developments as petrol prices continue to rise amid the ongoing Middle East conflict. Millat Tractors Ltd has confirmed that one of its group co...

item.title: Senior Karnataka Minister D Sudhakar Passes Away After Prolonged Illness
item.description: In the early hours of Sunday, senior Karnataka Minister D Sudhakar, aged 66, passed away after battling a prolonged illness. He was receiving treatment for a lung infection for the past two months at ...

item.title: Wispr Flow Expands Voice AI Services in India Despite Linguistic Challenges
item.description: India presents a complex market for voice-based AI due to its linguistic diversity, mixed-language usage, and uneven monetization, yet Wispr Flow, a Bay Area startup, sees significant growth potential...

item.title: The Ongoing Mental Health Challenges Facing South Africa’s Nurses After COVID-19
item.description: During the COVID-19 pandemic, South African nurses faced extreme pressures, including high patient volumes, risk of infection, and witnessing significant patient mortality. Beyond the immediate crisis...

item.title: Honouring the Quiet Strength and Daily Dedication of Mothers
item.description: As we mark Mother’s Day, the focus is on the everyday, often invisible work that mothers do to hold families together. The article reflects on the author’s own mother, Radha Naidoo, and the quiet stre...

item.title: Study Reveals Scalp Hormone Marker Explains Female Pattern Hair Loss Despite Normal Blood Tests
item.description: Many women experience frustrating hair loss even when standard blood tests for hormones like testosterone, thyroid function, and vitamin levels come back normal. A recent study from Delhi's Ram Manoha...

item.title: Tropical Storm Caloy’s trough expected to bring rains over Eastern Visayas and Mindanao
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) reports that the trough of Tropical Storm Caloy may trigger rainfall over Eastern Visayas and parts of Mindana...

item.title: GHQ holds first anniversary ceremony of Marka-e-Haq conflict with senior military leadership in attendance
item.description: A special ceremony was held at the General Headquarters (GHQ) in Rawalpindi to mark the first anniversary of what is described as the “Marka-e-Haq” victory, referring to the military confrontation bet...

item.title: RBA raises interest rates for the third time this year, households to feel delayed impact
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) has implemented its third consecutive interest rate hike, raising the official cash rate by 25 basis points to 4.35 per cent. Despite this, many mortgage holders ha...

item.title: Arvind Kejriwal alleges BJP misusing central agencies in Punjab
item.description: AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal has alleged that the BJP is misusing central agencies like the Enforcement Directorate (ED) and CBI for political advantage in Punjab. He claims that repeated ED actions are ...

item.title: Kebbi State Appoints Sole Administrator for AFUSTA After Sack of Principal Officers
item.description: The Kebbi State Government don sack all principal officers and board members of Abdullahi Fodio University of Science and Technology, Aliero (AFUSTA) after dem reconciliation efforts fail. Dem don app...

item.title: The Importance of History in Philippine Education and Society
item.description: The article discusses the crucial role of historical knowledge in shaping civic awareness and informed citizens in the Philippines. It highlights how education has long been used to influence society,...

item.title: Princess Margriet of the Netherlands attends Canadian Tulip Festival in Ottawa
item.description: Princess Margriet of the Netherlands visited Ottawa this week to attend the 74th Canadian Tulip Festival, an event celebrating the historic connection between Canada and the Netherlands. Born in Ottaw...

item.title: Vijay Announces Cabinet Members for Tamil Nadu, Including TVK Leaders
item.description: C Joseph Vijay, founder of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), is all set to take oath as the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu on Sunday, with the ceremony to be conducted by Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arle...

item.title: KZN Treasury sets strict measures to improve municipal financial governance
item.description: The KwaZulu-Natal MEC for Finance, Francois Rodgers, has introduced a firm set of “non-negotiable” measures aimed at fixing ongoing financial and governance issues in municipalities across the provinc...

item.title: Gosnells man charged for distributing offensive leaflets targeting LGBTQ community
item.description: A 47-year-old man from Gosnells is set to appear in Perth Magistrates Court on July 15, after allegedly distributing thousands of leaflets deemed obscene, targeting members of Perth’s LGBTQ community....

item.title: Calgary model train enthusiasts showcase decades of craftsmanship at Supertrain show
item.description: Supertrain, one of Canada's largest model train exhibitions, recently brought together over 100 exhibitors in Calgary. Among the participants was the Calgary Model Trainmen club, who presented an evol...
